crown.name: CSK_Module_MultiRemoteLiDAR
crown.desc: This is an automatically generated CROWN (description not necessary).

crown.name: CSK_MultiRemoteLiDAR
crown.desc: Module to provide RemoteScan configuration functionality. + Multiple instances can be created and scan processing will run in multiple threads on the device. + Incoming scans can be used / processed in other apps / modules. + Typically the features of this module are used like this (check also main script of this module): + {empty} + **1) Setup** + 1) If multiple scanner instances are available, selecte a specific sensor via "setSelectedInstance" + 2) Set interface type to connect to sensor via "setInterface" + 3) Optionally set sensor IP via "setIP" if interface is "ETHERNET" + 4) Start sensor camera via "startSensor" + 5) Other modules can register on the "OnNewScan"-event by getting the Scan provider handle via "getLiDARHandle" (before they can check the instance amount via "getInstancesAmount") + {empty} + **2) Access from other applications** + You can process incoming scans in other modules by getting the Scan handle via 'getLiDARHandle' and registering to its "OnNewScan"-event to get them directly wihtin your app. + {empty} + **3) Merge with encoder data** + It is possible to merge incoming scan data with the data of a connected encoder. It is needed to run the CSK_Module_Encoder in parallel. + Activate it via "setEncoderMode". It is possible to configure the duration of the measurement via "setEncoderDurationMode(Value)". + Additionally you can trigger this measurement via a predefined event from another app (see "setEncoderTriggerEvent"). + After the measurement was finished, it will provide the result as a PointCloud within the "OnNewEncoderScan[NUM]" event. +

enum.name: Interface
enum.desc: Interface used to connect to the LiDAR sensor.

item.desc: Default standard LMS type for LMS100,LMS500,TIM.
item.name: LMSX00

item.desc: Special type for S300 and S3000.
item.name: S300

item.desc: Will use default standard LMS type but with special processing.
item.name: MRS1000

event.name: OnNewStatusLoadParameterOnReboot
event.desc: Notify status if parameters should be loaded on app/device boot up.

event.name: OnPersistentDataModuleAvailable
event.desc: Notify status if features of CSK_PersistentData module are available.

event.name: OnNewInstanceList
event.desc: Event to provide list of created instances.

event.name: OnNewProcessingParameter
event.desc: Event to share processing parameters to the instances.

param.desc: Number of the instance to receive the parameter.
param.name: objectNo

param.desc: If parameter is for specifici internal used object, its nnumber.
param.name: internalObjectNo

event.name: OnNewSelectedInstance
event.desc: Notify if new instance is selected.

event.name: OnDataLoadedOnReboot
event.desc: Event to call if module tried to load parameters and should be ready.

event.name: OnNewResultNUM
event.desc: Example of dynamically created event to provide result of instance. + NUM will be replaced by the number of instance (e.g. "OnNewResult1"). + INFO: Other modules can check via "Script.isServedAsEvent" if event of sepecific instance exists.

event.name: OnNewParameterName
event.desc: Notify name of persistent data parameter.

event.name: OnUserLevelOperatorActive
event.desc: Status of Operator userlevel. Used internally in combination with the CSK_UserManagement module if available.

event.name: OnUserLevelMaintenanceActive
event.desc: Status of Maintenance userlevel. Used internally in combination with the CSK_UserManagement module if available.

event.name: OnUserLevelServiceActive
event.desc: Status of Service userlevel. Used internally in combination with the CSK_UserManagement module if available.

event.name: OnUserLevelAdminActive
event.desc: Status of Admin userlevel. Used internally in combination with the CSK_UserManagement module if available.

event.name: OnNewValueUpdateNUM
event.desc: Example of dynamically created event to sync paramters between instance threads and Controller part of module. + NUM will be replaced by the number of instance (e.g. "OnNewValueUpdate1"). +

param.desc: Instance new value is coming from.
param.name: instance

param.desc: Name of the paramter to update/sync.
param.name: parameter

param.desc: Optionally if internal parameter should be used for internal objects.
param.name: selectedObject

event.name: OnNewValueToForwardNUM
event.desc: Example of dynamically created event to forward data from instance thread to Controler part of module, e.g. to forward values to UI. + NUM will be replaced by the number of instance (e.g. "OnNewValueToForward1").

param.desc: Eventname to use to forward value.
param.name: eventname

event.name: OnNewResult
event.desc: Generic event to notify results. E.g. to forward results from single instances.

event.name: OnDeregisterLiDARSensorNUM
event.desc: Example of dynamically created event to deregister LiDAR sensor intsance to scan processing function. + NUM will be replaced by the number of instance (e.g. "OnDeregisterLiDARSensor1"). + INFO: Other modules can check via "Script.isServedAsEvent" if event of sepecific instance exists.

event.name: OnRegisterLiDARSensorNUM
event.desc: Example of dynamically created event to register LiDAR sensor intsance to scan processing function. + NUM will be replaced by the number of instance (e.g. "OnRegisterLiDARSensor1"). + INFO: Other modules can check via "Script.isServedAsEvent" if event of sepecific instance exists.

event.name: OnNewViewerID
event.desc: Notify currently used viewerID (e.g. to show correct viewer in UI).

event.name: OnNewStatusInterface
event.desc: Notify interface of currently selected sensor.

event.name: OnNewStatusSensorIP
event.desc: Notify IP of currently selected sensor.

event.name: OnNewStatusSensorType
event.desc: Notify type of sensor.

event.name: OnNewStatusIPError
event.desc: Notify if configured IP is faulty.

event.name: OnNewStatusInternalProcessing
event.desc: Notify if incoming scans are processed in this module.

event.name: OnNewStatusInstanceAmount
event.desc: Notify amount of instances.

event.name: OnNewStatusViewerType
event.desc: Notify type of currently active viewer.

event.name: OnNewScanViewerID
event.desc: Notify currently used scanViewerID (e.g. to show correct viewer in UI).

event.name: OnNewStatusEncoderMode
event.desc: Notify if sensor data shoud be combined with encoder data.

event.name: OnNewStatusEncoderDurationMode
event.desc: Notify encoder duration mode.

event.name: OnNewStatusEncoderDurationModeValue
event.desc: Notify related value for encoderDurationMode.

event.name: OnNewEncoderScanNUM
event.desc: Notify scan data merged with encoder data Example of dynamically created event to provide scan data merged with encoder info if encoderMode is active. + NUM will be replaced by the number of instance (e.g. "OnNewEncoderScan1"). + INFO: Other modules can check via "Script.isServedAsEvent" if event of sepecific instance exists.

event.name: OnNewStatusEncoderModeLoop
event.desc: Notify if the module should automatically retrigger encoder measurements.

event.name: OnNewStatusViewerActive
event.desc: Notify if scan should be shown in viewer.

event.name: OnNewStatusEncoderTriggerEvent
event.desc: Notify event to start encoder scan measurement if notified.

event.name: OnNewStatusFlowConfigPriority
event.desc: Notify if FlowConfig should have priority for FlowConfig relevant configurations.

event.name: OnNewStatusCSKStyle
event.desc: Notify UI style to use for CSK modules.

event.name: OnNewStatusModuleVersion
event.desc: Notify version of module.

event.name: OnNewStatusModuleIsActive
event.desc: Notify if module can be used on device.

function.name: setParameterName
function.desc: Function to set the name of the parameters if saved/loaded via the CSK_PersistentData module.

function.name: sendParameters
function.desc: Send parameters to CSK_PersistentData module if possible to save them.

param.desc: [Optional] Set to TRUE if the data should NOT be saved immediately after sending.
param.name: noDataSave

function.name: setLoadOnReboot
function.desc: Configure if this module should load its saved parameters at app/device boot up.

function.name: pageCalled
function.desc: Function to register "OnResume" of the module UI (only as helper function).

return.desc: Empty string (only needed to simplify binding).
return.name: empty

function.name: setSelectedInstance
function.desc: Select one of the multiple instances.

function.name: getInstancesAmount
function.desc: Get the amount of created instances of this module.

function.name: processInstanceNUM
function.desc: Example of dynamically served function to process internally coded function. + NUM will be replaced by the number of instance (e.g. "processInstance1"). + INFO: Other modules can check via "Script.isServedAsFunction" if function of sepecific instance exists. + Needs then to be called via "Script.callFunction".

function.name: addInstance
function.desc: Function to add an additional instance.

function.name: resetInstances
function.desc: Function to reset instances to one single instance. IMPORTANT: As instances start their own threads, the module needs to be restarted if new instances are needed... (see AppEngine docu for "Script.startScript").

function.name: startLiDARSensor
function.desc: Function to start currently selected LiDAR sensor instance.

function.name: stopLiDARSensor
function.desc: Function to stop currently selected LiDAR sensor.

function.name: setInterface
function.desc: Function to set interface to LiDAR sensor.

function.name: setIP
function.desc: Function to set IP of LiDAR sensor.

function.name: setSensorType
function.desc: Function to set type of LiDAR sensor.

function.name: getLiDARHandle
function.desc: Function to return LiDAR scanner handle (to make use of it in other modules).

function.name: setInternalProcessing
function.desc: Function to configure if incomings scans should be processed in this module or just to provide them for other modules.

function.name: setViewerType
function.desc: Function to set what kind of viewer to use.

function.name: setEncoderMode
function.desc: Function to activate encoder mode.

function.name: setEncoderDurationMode
function.desc: Function to set encoder duration mode.

function.name: setEncoderDurationModeValue
function.desc: Function to configure encoder duration mode value.

function.name: triggerEncoderMeasurement
function.desc: Function to trigger new encoder measurement.

function.name: setEncoderModeLoop
function.desc: Function to set if it automatically should retrigger an encoder measurement.

function.name: setViewerActive
function.desc: Function to set if scan should be shown in viewer.

function.name: setEncoderTriggerEvent
function.desc: Function to set event to start encoder measurement if notified.

function.name: clearFlowConfigRelevantConfiguration
function.desc: Function to clear FlowConfig relevant configurations.

function.name: setFlowConfigPriority
function.desc: Function to configure if FlowConfig should have priority for FlowConfig relevant configuration.

function.name: loadParameters
function.desc: Load parameters for this module from the CSK_PersistentData module if possible and use them.

function.name: getStatusModuleActive
function.desc: Function to get status if module is active.

function.name: getParameters
function.desc: Function to get all parameters of the client in JSON format.

param.desc: Number of instance to get parameters from.
param.name: instanceNo

function.name: resetModule
function.desc: Function to reset main configuration of module.

crown.name: MultiRemoteLiDAR_FC
crown.desc: Crown to provide CSK_FlowConfig relevant features.

event.name: OnNewScan
event.desc: Provide scan acquired by sensor.

param.desc: Handle to internally used FlowConfig instance.
param.name: handle

param.desc:
'CSK_MultiRemoteLiDAR.OnNewScanSensor[InstanceNUM]' or 'HANDLE[NUM]'
Parameter:
MODE = HANDLE 1: Command to get Handle (Scan.Provider.RemoteScanner)
MODE = SCANS 1: Scan (Scan)
param.name: OnNewScan

function.name: create
function.desc: Internally used CSK_FlowConfig create function.

param.desc:
Mode to provide source.
'HANDLE' = Receiver gets command to get ScanProvider handle (recommended)
'SCANS' = Receiver gets scans directly
param.name: Mode

return.desc: Handle to internally used FlowConfig instance.
return.name: handle

function.name: register
function.desc: Internally used CSK_FlowConfig register function.

param.desc: Handle to internally used FlowConfig instance.
param.name: handle

crown.name: EncoderSource
crown.desc: Set source of encoder and optional trigger event.

function.name: create
function.desc: Internally used CSK_FlowConfig create function.

return.desc: Handle to internally used FlowConfig instance.
return.name: handle

function.name: encoderSource
function.desc: Set source of encoder and optional trigger event.

param.desc: Handle to internally used FlowConfig instance.
param.name: handle

param.desc:
Trigger event to start scan in encoder mode.
Parameter: 1: Event (STRING)
param.name: trigger
